Process

Implementation Timeline

From concept to launch in 12-16 weeks

🔍

Step 1

Site Assessment

Comprehensive analysis of location, power infrastructure, and requirements

1-2 weeks
📐

Step 2

Design & Planning

Custom design for optimal performance, capacity, and cost efficiency

2-4 weeks
🔧

Step 3

Installation

Professional installation by certified technicians with minimal disruption

4-8 weeks
✓

Step 4

Testing & Commissioning

Rigorous testing, certification, and staff training

1-2 weeks
🚀

Step 5

Launch & Support

24/7 monitoring, maintenance, and continuous optimization
